Hi, I'm Sejal
AWS DevOps Engineer

Passionate DevOps Engineer based in India specializing in AWS, Terraform, Jenkins, Docker, CI/CD pipelines and cloud automation. I design scalable, secure and cost-optimized cloud infrastructures with zero-downtime deployments.

Let's Connect

About Me

I specialize in building automated DevOps workflows, implementing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, configuring CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins, and managing containerized applications with Docker. I focus on reliability, security, performance optimization, and smooth production releases using blue-green deployment strategies.

Technical Skills

AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, RDS, CloudWatch)
Terraform (Infrastructure as Code)
Jenkins (CI/CD Pipelines)
Docker & Containerization
Linux Administration
Git & Version Control

Projects

CI/CD Pipeline Automation

Implemented automated build and deployment pipelines using Jenkins integrated with Docker and AWS EC2.

Infrastructure as Code Setup

Designed reusable Terraform modules to provision scalable AWS infrastructure environments.

Blue-Green Deployment Strategy

Enabled zero-downtime deployments with quick rollback capability ensuring high availability.
